_note: Updatable catalog of selectable chat models. The app fetches this file from the repo at runtime (raw GitHub) so new models appear WITHOUT an app update; this bundled copy is the offline fallback. Each entry is just a HuggingFace repo + file: the app resolves the exact size and SHA256 live from HuggingFace (LFS oid) at download time, so no checksum maintenance is needed. 'sizeGB'/'paramsB' are approximate, used only for display and the VRAM range filter. 'default': true pre-selects the model at first run and shows the Recommended badge; 'recommended' is a short Italian hint shown under the model. To add a model: append an entry within the size range below and validate the repo/file exist on HuggingFace.

models.label: Qwen3 4B Instruct 2507
models.recommended: Equilibrio velocità/qualità, gira bene anche su GPU da 6-8 GB.

models.label: Qwen2.5 3B Instruct
models.recommended: Il più leggero: per GPU piccole o solo-CPU.

models.label: Qwen2.5 7B Instruct
models.recommended: Più accurato; richiede ~6-8 GB di VRAM per stare tutto in GPU.

models.label: Qwen2.5 14B Instruct
models.recommended: Massima qualità per Q&A complessi; richiede GPU da 8+ GB.

models.label: Mistral Nemo Instruct 2407
models.recommended: Il più capace; serve una GPU da 8+ GB per essere veloce.
